title: Browser Search Performed Event Payload
description: Schema for the payload of browser.search_performed events tracking search queries

searchEngine.description: Search engine used (e.g., google, bing, duckduckgo)

queryHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the search query for privacy-preserving tracking

queryWordCount.description: Number of words in the search query

queryCharCount.description: Number of characters in the search query

isVoiceSearch.description: Whether the search was initiated via voice

hasQuotes.description: Whether the query contained quoted phrases

hasOperators.description: Whether the query contained search operators (site:, -term, etc.)

sourceType.description: Where the search was initiated from

searchDurationMs.description: Time to display results in milliseconds

isRefinement.description: Whether this search refines a previous one

previousQueryHash.description: Hash of the previous query if this is a refinement

incognito.description: Whether the search was performed in incognito/private mode
